title: Issori language
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Issori''' was the language of the [[Issori]]s from the planet [[Issor]].

==Glossary of terms==
*''Vrecje'' - unsanctioned birth (translates as "stranger")
*''Whoon-cha'' - Fertilization of an Issori egg between two members of the nobility of the same nation.
*''Vuin-cha'' - Fertilization of an Issori egg between two members of the nobility of different nations.
*''Whoon-li'' - Fertilization of an Issori egg between a member of the nobility and a common caste member, within the same nation.
*''Vuin-li'' - Fertilization of an Issori egg between a member of the nobility and a common caste member of a different nation

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''
